title: adaptive-run-classifier run_config envelope
description: Substrate-neutral pre-execution classifier envelope. Defines per-phase model tier, reasoning level, and cardinality knobs for multi-phase agentic workflows. The minimal default (rollback target) requires only schema_version, enabled, and rationale; a classifier-emitted envelope additionally carries task_class, knobs, tiers, and reasoning.

schema_version.description: Envelope schema version. Adapter logs a warning on mismatch and falls back to defaults.

enabled.description: Feature flag mirror. When false, the workflow uses hardcoded baseline behavior (byte-identical to pre-port). When true, the classifier is invoked at workflow start.

task_class.description: Classifier-emitted task class. Extensible; future task classes added by updating both the skill enum and this schema in lockstep.

verify_policy.description: Per-claim vote counts keyed by source quality. Upfront lookup is the default path; escalation on confidence:low layers on top.

tiers.description: Per-phase model tier label. Substrate adapter maps the label to a concrete SKU per the tier table in SKILL.md.

reasoning.description: Per-phase reasoning level. Adapter conditionally emits thinking param only for balanced/top tiers (Haiku has no extended thinking).

batch_verify.description: Batch API on verify-phase. Schema field exists for forward compatibility; MVP default is false (Phase-7+ follow-up after synthesize-coupling design lands).

use_specialized_mcp.description: When true with primary_source_host set, the workflow's fetch prompt prefers the matching MCP server over generic WebFetch.

primary_source_host.description: e.g. learn.microsoft.com — pairs with use_specialized_mcp to route fetches through specialized MCP tools.

rationale.description: Mandatory human-readable one-sentence justification. The auditable trace the rest of the pipeline points back at. Min length is 1 to allow the default-baseline shape; classifier-emitted rationales are enforced to >=20 chars at the tool layer.
